mnemonics.title: Q-learning update rule
mnemonics.content: Q(s, a) ← Q(s, a) + α[r + γmax(Q(s', a')) - Q(s, a)]

mnemonics.title: SARSA update rule
mnemonics.content: Q(s, a) ← Q(s, a) + α[r + γQ(s', a') - Q(s, a)]

mnemonics.title: Disadvantages of model-free methods
mnemonics.content: Sample efficiency, exploration-exploitation trade-off, and overfitting.

mnemonics.title: Applications of model-free methods
mnemonics.content: Robotics, game playing, and recommendation systems.
